items.placeName: Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc

facebook.caption: Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc is the kind of place that pulls you in with its lights and keeps you there with its energy. Tucked inside the Grand World complex, this pedestrian street and night market is one of the liveliest spots on the island after dark. Browse stalls selling souvenirs, snacks, and local crafts, grab a bite from the food vendors, and soak up the buzzing atmosphere. Practical tip: arrive after 7 PM when the market is fully alive and the crowds bring the whole place to life.
facebook.video_caption: Lights glowing, stalls packed, and food smells drifting through the air. This is Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc after dark, the pedestrian night market inside Grand World where the island really comes alive in the evening. Come hungry, come curious, and give yourself time to wander.

instagram.caption: When the sun goes down, Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc lights up inside Grand World and becomes the island's go-to evening hangout. Stalls, snacks, souvenirs, and serious people-watching energy. Best after 7 PM.
instagram.video_caption: Neon lights, busy stalls, street food smells. Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc is where Phu Quoc nights actually happen. Do not miss this one.

tiktok.caption: Phu Quoc after dark hits different at Phố đi bộ - chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Lights, food, vibes. Go after 7 PM. #PhuQuoc #NightMarket #VietnamTravel #GrandWorld

scenes: Grand World lights up at night
Street food you have to try

items.placeName: Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving

facebook.caption: If scuba diving is on your Phu Quoc bucket list, Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving is the name you want to know. Tucked along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in Duong Dong, this highly rated dive center has earned a perfect 5 out of 5 across 175 reviews, which says a lot in a competitive island market. Whether you are a complete beginner or a certified diver looking to explore the reefs around Phu Quoc, they cater to both. Practical tip: book your spot at least a day ahead, especially during peak season, as slots fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what happens when you drop below the surface off Phu Quoc. The clips from Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving show clear warm water, colorful reef, and divers who look like they are having the time of their lives. This is the kind of experience that turns a beach holiday into something you actually remember.

instagram.caption: A perfect 5-star rating from 175 divers does not lie. Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where your underwater Phu Quoc adventure starts. Book ahead, the slots go quickly.
instagram.video_caption: Clear water, colorful reefs, and zero regrets. Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving is rated 5 stars by 175 happy divers, and the footage shows exactly why.

tiktok.caption: 175 divers gave it 5 stars. Lặn biển Phú Quốc - Delight Diving might be your best day in Phu Quoc. #PhuQuoc #ScubaDiving #VietnamTravel #DiveLife

video_script.hook: Best dive spot in Phu Quoc?
scenes: Book at least one day ahead
